sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Uber Technologies, Inc의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 총예약액이 497억 달러로 21% 성장했고 운행 건수는 22% 늘어난 35억 건을 기록했습니다.
매출은 135억 달러였고 영업이익은 11억 달러, 조정 EBITDA는 33% 증가한 23억 달러였습니다.

businessChanges.text: 조정 EBITDA 마진(총예약액 대비)이 4.5%로 전년 동기 4.1%에서 개선됐습니다.
12억 달러 규모의 전환사채를 상환할 계획임을 밝혔습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 영업활동 현금흐름은 23억 달러, 잉여현금흐름은 22억 달러였고 분기 말 현금성자산은 91억 달러였습니다.

watchItems.text: 154% 급증한 GAAP 순이익에는 지분투자 평가이익 등 일회성 요인이 반영된 것으로 보여, 본업 수익성과 구분해 볼 필요가 있습니다.
조정 EBITDA 마진 개선 추세가 이어질지가 향후 수익성의 핵심 변수입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 uberq325earningspressrelea.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Uber Announces Results for Third Quarter 2025 Trips grew 22% year-over-year and Gross Bookings grew 21% year-over-year Income from operations of $1.1 billion; Adjusted EBITDA of $2.3 billion, up 33% year-over-year Operating cash flow of $2.3 billion and Free cash flow of $2.2 billion SAN FRANCISCO – November 4, 2025 – Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) today announced financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025. “Uber’s growth kicked into high gear in Q3, marking one of the largest trip-volume increases in the company’s history,” said Dara Khosrowshahi, CEO. “We’re building on that momentum by investing in lifelong customer relationships, leaning into our local commerce strategy, and harnessing the transformative potential of AI and autonomy.” “We delivered anot  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $2.3 billion = 23억 달러; $2.2 billion = 22억 달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $2.3 = 2.3달러; $2.2 = 2.2달러.

nd bottom lines, with accelerating growth and record profitability,” said Prashanth Mahendra-Rajah, CFO. “This consistent execution positions us very well to invest in the many accretive growth opportunities ahead, while maintaining our commitment to returning capital to shareholders.” Financial and Operational Highlights for Third Quarter 2025 • Trips during the quarter grew 22% year-over-year (“YoY”) to 3.5 billion, driven by Monthly Active Platform Consumers (“MAPCs") growth of 17% YoY and monthly Trips per MAPC growth of 4% YoY. • Gross Bookings grew 21% YoY to $49.7 billion, or 21% on a constant currency basis. • Revenue grew 20% YoY to $13.5 billion, and 19% on a constant currency basis. • Income from operations grew 5% YoY to $1.1 billion.  Normalized numeric aliases: 3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $49.7 billion = 497억 달러; $13.5 billion = 135억 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $6.6 billion = 66억 달러; $4.9 billion = 49억 달러; $49.7 = 49.7달러; $13.5 = 13.5달러; $6.6 = 6.6달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $4.9 = 4.9달러.

justed EBITDA grew 33% YoY to $2.3 billion. Adjusted EBITDA margin as a percentage of Gross Bookings was 4.5%, up from 4.1% in Q3 2024. • Net cash provided by operating activities was $2.3 billion and free cash flow, defined as net cash flows from operating activities less capital expenditures, was $2.2 billion. • Unrestricted cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments were $9.1 billion at the end of the third quarter. We intend to redeem our $1.2 billion Convertible Notes due December 2025 in Q4 2025. Outlook for Q4 2025 For Q4 2025, we anticipate: • Gross Bookings of $52.25 billion to $53.75 billion, representing growth of   Normalized numeric aliases: $2.3 billion = 23억 달러; $2.2 billion = 22억 달러; $9.1 billion = 91억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $52.25 billion = 522억 5,000만 달러; $53.75 billion = 537억 5,000만 달러; $2.41 billion = 24억 1,000만 달러; $2.51 billion = 25억 1,000만 달러; $2.2 = 2.2달러; $2.41 = 2.41달러; $9.1 = 9.1달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $52.25 = 52.25달러; $53.75 = 53.75달러; $2.51 = 2.51달러.

(2) $ 2,612 $ 6,626 154 % Adjusted EBITDA (1) $ 1,690 $ 2,256 33 % Net cash provided by operating activities $ 2,151 $ 2,328 8 % Free cash flow  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $1,061 = 1,061달러; $1,113 = 1,113달러; $2,612 = 2,612달러; $6,626 = 6,626달러; $1,690 = 1,690달러; $2,256 = 2,256달러; $2,151 = 2,151달러; $2,109 = 2,109달러; 40,973 million = 409억 7,300만 달러; 1,113 million = 11억 1,300만 달러; 2,151 million = 21억 5,100만 달러; 1,690 million = 16억 9,000만 달러; 2,256 million = 22억 5,600만 달러; 2,328 million = 23억 2,800만 달러; 2,109 million = 21억 900만 달러; 2,230 million = 22억 3,000만 달러.
